programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Es Navidad y Tony DiNozzo no sabe si ser desagradable o bueno cuando su papa, Anthony DiNozzo padre llega de visita.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de NCIS investiga una conexión entre la muerte de un periodista y un oficial Naval, Ziva recibe una sorpresiva visita de su padre, a quien no vió en más de dos años.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Luego de un evento que acontece cerca de casa, el equipo de NCIS se une para buscar respuestas y pedir justicia en pos de proteger a los colegas más vulnerables.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el accidente de tránsito de un Marine y desata algunos tristes recuerdos de Abby cuando era una niña en búsqueda de rastros para resolver su "primer caso".

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Reglas no escritas
programme.desc: Cuando un robo a mano armada termina con la muerte de un oficial, Frank busca justicia. Pero las tensiones aumentan en la casa de los Reagan cuando Erin retira los cargos al sospechoso por falta de evidencia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La ciudad que nunca duerme
programme.desc: Cuando el famoso actor Russell Berke, quien siguió a Danny para investigar su próximo papel, es apuñalado, Danny lo ayuda, pero debe mantener el crimen en secreto debido al estatus de celebridad de Russell.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Proteger y servir
programme.desc: Danny negocia con un hombre que mantiene a Erin como rehén en la corte. Mientras, Frank decide el castigo para Jamie, quien desobedeció órdenes y fue suspendido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La verdad sobre mentir
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan la muerte de una adolescente empujada al metro. Frank se molesta por la supervisión del nuevo Inspector General en el NYPD.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamado a Kansas para investigar una serie de asesinatos, una reunión tensa comienza entre Blake y su padre, un capitán de policía retirado, y su hermano, un detective, y deben trabajar juntos para ayudar a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC va a San José para investigar una serie de asesinatos, García profundiza en su pasado hacker y se reencuentra con su antiguo amor para ayudar al equipo con el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These moms are desperate to find their children's missing fathers. But these denying dads say that there's no way they're the real fathers. When the DNA results are revealed, who will be proven right and who will be still searching for answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Se encuentra a una mujer muerta en el piso del cuarto de su apartamento.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, 121 personas en Dakota del Sur y Minnesota sufrieron una misteriosa enfermedad. Solo había habido un brote como ese, y cuando sucedió entonces, nadie pudo entender por qué.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, más de una docena de niños en Seattle, Washington, luchaban por sus vidas. Cada uno de ellos había contraído una enfermedad grave desconocida. Después de que uno murió, los investigadores sabían que el reloj estaba corriendo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un disparo en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros. ¿Pero fue un homicidio o un suicidio? Se necesitaría la experiencia de expertos forenses y dos juicios con jurado para determinar el destino del asesino acusado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerto al cirujano cardíaco Darryl Sutorius en el sótano de su lujosa casa de Cincinnati, la policía asume que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mejora digital del video de la cámara de seguridad muestra que lo que parece ser un encuentro casual es en realidad un secuestro forzado, que conduce al asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres desaparecieron y luego fueron encontradas brutalmente asesinadas, la policía se preguntó si fueron víctimas de un crimen de odio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuarto Frío
programme.desc: Se recuenta la desaparición en 1987 de Tracy Jo Shine, residente de Houston. La investigación se enfrió hasta el 2000, cuando un 'escuadrón de casos sin resolver' se enteró de que el exnovio de la mujer, Michael Neal, se había jactado de haberla matado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Dawn Bruce, de 22 años, es brutalmente asesinada en su apartamento de Virginia. Los investigadores notan una mancha de sangre en la funda de una almohada que parece haber sido hecha por uno de los dedos del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un caso inusual involucrando la violación y muerte de Nancy DePriest en 1988. Después de que Chris Ochoa confesara, el caso fue cerrado. 8 años después, Achim Marino confesó al mismo crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una estudiante universitaria desaparece, sus compañeros de clase estaban preocupados por la seguridad de ella y la de ellos.

programme.desc: Two Irish boxers dispute a world championship for the first time in history, as Lewis Crocker (21-0) and Paddy Donovan (14-1) do battle for the IBF welterweight title in a highly-anticipated Belfast rematch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is the inside story of selecting this year's Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders squad with all the emotion and drama as thousands of women hope to make the team.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Four candidates are called into the office for a meeting with Kelli and Judy. Who will be warned and who will be told, "This will be your last night"?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Three candidates are called into Kelli's office for a face-to-face meeting about their progress. The atmosphere is tense and emotional for all, but cuts must be made. Who lives to dance again at Valley Ranch?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is the inside story of selecting this year's Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders squad, with all the emotion and drama as thousands of women hope to make the team. After the best rookies are chosen to join the returning veterans,

programme.desc: This is the inside story of selecting this year's Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders squad, with all the emotion and drama as thousands of women hope to make the team. After the best rookies are chosen to join the returning veterans,

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After the best rookies are chosen to join the returning veterans, we follow the girls beyond the first game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Cowboys Stadium in Arlington, Texas is once again the venue for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tensions run high for the 69 new girls as the 18 returning DCC veterans join the competition for a coveted invitation to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begins tonight at Valley Ranch! The stress for the newly selected training camp candidates is evident as they struggle to re-arrange their schedules and secure new living arrangements in Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's two weeks into training camp, and Kelli and Judy are fixing to make their first cuts. This week's rehearsals are important for all the girls as they are expected to master the world-famous DCC kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week three of training camp and the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC "Makeovers." They're given a new look with a hair and make-up revamp and are transformed in the DCC mold.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tonight's rehearsal starts with a big bang when DCC Technical Director Kitty Carter makes a surprise visit to Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's a tense time for all and Training Camp Candidates who are not DCC ready will be exposed at the first and only field rehearsal on the Cowboys Stadium turf.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It has all come down to the final night of training camp. Tonight, dreams will be made or broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In this two-hour season premiere of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team, 600 hopeful candidates arrive at Cowboys Stadium for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp opens and many of the new candidates have had to uproot their lives and move to Dallas with no guarantee of making it through Training Camp to become a Dallas Cowboy Cheerleader.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A double homicide in upstate New York leads detectives on a cross-country investigation to piece together a case with a surprising suspect at the center.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a Pennsylvania man who was convinced his messy divorce put a target on his back is found stabbed to death, his friends and family realize he was right all along in predicting his own gruesome murder.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: As detectives investigate a mother of two's sudden disappearance, her friends and family reveal she feared she was being stalked.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a young father is found dead in his home in Jonesboro, Ark., the authorities search for the killer.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mother of two who vanishes during a storm turns out to be a victim of something sinister.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a father goes missing and his body is found in a field several miles away, the investigation reveals multiple suspects -- including members of his own family.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man convicted of murdering a woman in her upscale Austin, Texas, home tells his story for the first time.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Mudbowl III
programme.desc: It's Pink Bus vs. Blue Bus in the muddiest of Mudbowls yet! Bret flies away with the MVP for an intimate overnight trip.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Truck Stop Games
programme.desc: In a wacky competition based on beer, babes and truckers, one team will try anything to sway the judges.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bikini Day Care
programme.desc: The tour hits Panama City Beach, Florida. Seven girls show their mothering skills by taking care of a gaggle of rowdy youngsters at the pool.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Exes and Ohs!
programme.desc: Secrets come out when Bret invites his ex-girlfriend Ambre and Rock of Love alum Heather to interrogate the remaining six girl's exes.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Duet To Me One More Time
programme.desc: Four girls are challenged to write lyrics to one of Bret's songs and sing with him.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Double Dates
programme.desc: Bret plans a couple of fantasy dates for his last three girls, but when one girl gets to go twice, the other two are worried that Bret has already made his final decision.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bret’s Rock of Love III
programme.desc: Bret takes his final two girls to the Dominican Republic to spend some quality, romantic time with each one before making his final choice.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Rock of Love Girls Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: What the hell happened to all those girls? From actress to artist, scholar to show girl, prom queen to porn star, they've all gone on to bigger and better things.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Casting Special
programme.desc: From twins to super freaks, peep the girls vying for Flav's heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: In Flav We Trust
programme.desc: Flavor Flav has put his heart on the line three times only to have it handed back to him. But he is willing to give it one final go – swearing he'll find true love or die trying!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Pimp My Gurney
programme.desc: Waking up with 15 girls, Flav quickly presents their first challenge. Flav's looking for a girl that can mend his broken heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Flav asks the remaining 13 girls to create a theme restaurant for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Things That Go Bump On The Lip
programme.desc: Flav splits his ladies up into two teams for the first ever Flavorette Roast Challenge. Each team picks one girl from the other team to put in the hot seat, and they cut loose with a full on verbal beatdown.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Lyin The Witch And The Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for someone who can be a mother as well as a mate, so he has the girls create a bedtime story for a group of children.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma steps into the lead role in Dracula, but her recent extra-curricular activities with Jay prove even more dramatic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner has difficulty dealing with the return of injured Jimmy. He hasn’t talked to him since the shooting, and his guilt over what he did leaves him unable to welcome Jimmy back to school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie is finding it hard to make ends meet now that she’s living on her own and hates relying on her mother for rent, especially with its obligatory dinners to pick up the cheque.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige and Matt are totally in love, so what if they have to keep it secret? It’s worth all the extra effort.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With school coming to a close, Marco is making huge plans for his summer with Dylan – and their future. He’s considering fast-tracking to graduate high school, joining Dylan in university a year earlier.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dutifully picking up the Spirit Squad slack for a love-struck Paige all year, Manny feels betrayed when Paige claims all the glory. So Manny plots her revenge with a complicated cheer that leaves Paige with a broken leg on Prom Night.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley’s leaving for the summer, and the idea of their temporary farewell and the stress of writing a song for Kevin Smith’s movie -- is making him, well, nuts. So Craig decides to do whatever it takes to follow her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frustrated by everything around him, Craig runs away. As he wanders the street, he befriends a young busker nicknamed, “Skinny”.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Paige and Spinner awkwardly discuss last night's surprising kiss-fest, Darcy interrupts. She regrets their fight and breakup. But Spinner tells her he meant what he said – if Darcy can’t accept him, past and all, they're through.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Another year at Degrassi kicks off and Manny decides she’s going to be a serious actress, whatever it takes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s still foggy on what exactly it was that happened at Peter’s party the night before. She knows she made a pretty racy video but Peter will erase everything… or so he says.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has got her whole life mapped out. She plans on being accepted into the marketing program at the best university in Canada.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: JT has got his license. He’s got a steady girlfriend in Liberty, who happens to be Student Council President. So why is he feeling anything but a “man”? Because Liberty’s in control.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After all the craziness of last year, Craig has one overriding goal: no drama. He’s focused on his friends, his family, his studies, and his band – a reconstituted Downtown Sasquatch but no Spinner - a new addition is rocking the drum-kit…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After proving he’s still got talent on the hardwood, Jimmy is invited to try out for the Wheelchair Basketball Association’s Junior Team. It’s Jimmy’s second chance at athletic stardom, and an opportunity to make his father proud.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Liberty’s pregnancy enters its sixth month, she and JT are forced to face reality: even though no longer a couple, they have to deal with the pregnancy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, JT has stolen drugs from the pharmacy… He becomes entangled in a web between his boss, the drug dealer, and the police.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Someone’s definitely interested in Marco. But as it turns out, Tim is interested in Marco, but not for the expected reason. Tim knows Marco is gay, and has been struggling with how to come out to his friends and family.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The one-year anniversary of the school shooting is approaching and everyone’s feeling the weight of it. Not least of whom is Spinner Mason, still persona non grata.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight is the premiere of “Jay and Silent Bob Go Canadian, Eh” and with many of the students and faculty on the guest list, it’s like the whole school is gripped in movie premiere fever!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige wakes Alex up in her bed – Paige spent the night on the floor – and as the two girls awkwardly prepare for school, they try to avoid the elephant in the room. As in, that they KISSED last night. What happened?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig bursts into rehearsal with the good news – they’ve been accepted to perform at a Northern Sounds Showcase. The band is NOT so into it at first – music is Craig’s dream, not theirs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since being "saved" everything has been going Spinner's way: he's made a good friend in Friendship Club leader Linus; his relationship with Darcy has been going strong, and his recent interest in improving school life has been getting him noticed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Simpson-Nelson household is in chaos. With Snake gone and Spike totally down in the dumps, keeping the household together has fallen totally onto Emma’s shoulders.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Ancient Powers

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment, they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.desc: Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.

programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Jakarta's slums lies a drug-gang’s safe house, home to some of the most terrifying and ruthless fighters in the city. Arriving before dawn, an elite swat team moves in to take down the notorious drug lord that runs it.

programme.title: The Raid 2 (Subtitled)
programme.desc: Following immediately after the events of THE RAID, Rama (Iko Uwais) is forced to reinvent himself as an undercover cop in order to provide protection for his wife and child.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: An epic set against the breathtaking landscapes of ancient China, Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon combines the exhilarating martial arts choreography by Yuen Wo-Ping with the sensitivity and classical storytelling of an Ang Lee film.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master [Cantonese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend [English-Language Version]
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: The Bodyguard from Beijing [Cantonese-Language Version]
programme.desc: A corrupt businessman commits a murder and the only witness is the girlfriend of another businessman with close connections to the Chinese government.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.desc: Ransik runs out of mutant prisoners to fight for him while Frax prepares to launch his own assault on Silver Hills.

programme.desc: The Rangers learn Zen-Aku's true identity and how he became an evil warrior for the Orgs.

programme.desc: The ancient Animarian warrior Merrick fights to atone for his past misdeeds.

programme.desc: The mysterious new Org General Necronomica fights the Rangers while Merrick finds a new home.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Alyssa helps Cole search for information on his long-lost parents while Master Org tries to hide his past from Jindrax and Toxica.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Max tries to regain the respect of his former bowling mentor in order to help him defeat a peculiar new Org.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Danny competes with a wealthy rival for Kendall while preventing the Wedding Dress Org from capturing Turtle Cove's brides to be.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Alyssa must rely on her martial arts heritage when the Rangers come up against Samurai Org.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The especially powerful Tombstone Org tries to send the Rangers six feet under while Merrick and the Princess try to appease the only Zord capable of saving them.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Nayzor returns more powerful than ever requiring the Rangers to quest across time and space to find a new Zord's help.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Wild Force Rangers join forces with the Silver Guardians to stop three time-traveling monsters from the year 3001.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Power Ranges Time Force travel back in time to help the Power Rangers Wild Force, to prevent the three Mut-Orgs from joining forces with Master Org.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Cole learns the truth about his parents when Master Org reveals his sinister origin to the Wild Force Rangers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although there are perks to living in their new country home, like House & Garden wanting to do a spread on them, the Ricardos find that it is expensive in Connecticut. Lucy decides to raise chickens and sell eggs as a moneymaking sideline.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, impatient with their egg selling business, decide that they must trade in their 500 chicks for 200 egg laying hens. However, after a couple of weeks, these hens don't yield many eggs at all.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to take part in the fund-raising campaign of the Westport Historical Society and offers to get her husband and his band to perform for their kickoff function. There's only one hitch – Ricky refuses to do it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy dreams of a night in New York City after spending six whole weeks in their new Connecticut home and it turns into a nightmare. Carefully hoarded tickets to a Broadway musical are supposed to take the Ricardos and the Mertzes to see the sold-out show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha is able to escape from the miniature garden with the help of Miroku and the others, and goes to save Kagome.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango returns to the demon slayer village and repairs her Hiraikotsu. She also lays her father and her comrades' ashes to rest.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Naraku calls upon a priestess named Tsubaki. Fifty years ago, Tsubaki was defeated by Kikyo when she went after the Shikon Jewel.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome desperately fights the curse placed on her by Tsubaki, a dark priestess. Meanwhile, Kikyo appears before Tsubaki.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Tsubaki's curse steals Kagome's consciousness. Kagome forgets feudal Japan in an illusory world.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Tsubaki visits the onmyoji mansion where she once trained.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Tsubaki is a priestess who was considered to be on par with Kikyo.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: One night, someone possesses Sango to attack Miroku. The group examines the centipede demon that they suspect was behind it, but they are mistaken.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: There is a rift in Naraku's barrier. But it's the beginning of the month, and when night falls, Inuyasha loses his demon powers.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagura approaches Sesshomaru and tells him to kill Naraku, but Sesshomaru refuses.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Shippo is sent a letter challenging him to a battle. The letter's sender is Soten Raijyu, and he is still just a child.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: A demon born from a piece of flesh that Naraku discarded transforms into a man without a face and steals the handsome face of Muso, a traveling monk.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Muso attacks Kagome. Inuyasha destroys him with his Wind Scar. Naraku, who was watching the event, tells Kagura to tell Inuyasha where Muso went.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Muso regenerates even thought he was hit with the Wind Scar. Miroku tells Inuyasha that Muso has a heart in the area where he has a spider marking.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha visits Totosai in search of a technique that can break through Naraku's barrier. There he meets Bunza, a wildcat-demon child.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Myoga comes to deliver a message from Totosai.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Hyakki Bat demon Otakemaru tries to destroy the village along with Shiori's mother.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Panther Tribe attacks from the west.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha slices through the Panthers' barrier with his red Tetsusaiga, and Inuyasha and Koga make their way into the castle town.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Panther King, the general of the Panther Tribe, begins to move with the power of the Shikon Jewel. Inuyasha and Sesshomaru attack the mummy.

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Inuyasha

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el verano de 1998, una mujer acaudalada de Jackson, Misisipi, desapareció de su casa a plena luz del día. Solo quedó una misteriosa nota al azar con doce nombres y sin instrucciones específicas.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Arizona, un cargamento de dinero desapareció en el desierto junto con los dos hombres contratados para vigilarlo. El FBI no sabía si los guardias eran participantes o víctimas de una emboscada.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El Alabama, un par de criminales condenados escaparon de la custodia de un oficial local y huyeron a lo largo del país. Mientras huían de las autoridades, fueron de estado en estado y desataron una ola de secuestros y robos de autos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1992, una madre joven fue baleada frente a su hijo. La policía buscó respuestas, pero no encontró ninguna. El horrible crimen parecía carente de motivo y sentido, solo por azar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Memphis, Tennessee, un horrible crimen dejó aterrados a los residentes de la zona. Cuando una madre joven y acaudalada fue secuestrada frente a la casa de sus suegros, la policía tenía muchos sospechosos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1997, una serie de crímenes en una pequeña comunidad agrícola de Iowa dejó a los residentes sorprendidos y aterrados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A finales de los ochenta, las importaciones de cocaína en Florida estaban entre las más altas del país. El homicidio y la intimidación se impusieron en los territorios.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Kokomo, Indiana, un crimen impensable aterrorizó a los residentes. Una mujer fue secuestrada de su casa una clara mañana de primavera.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En julio de 1997, un triple homicidio aterrorizó a los residentes de la capital del país. En un café en Georgetown, tres empleados fueron asesinados por disparos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1986, la pequeña ciudad sin crímenes de Indiana se tornó violenta por la llegada de un extraño muy peligroso. Después de que un oficial fuera baleado a quemarropa, el asesino psicótico llevó a los investigadores a través del Medio Oeste.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En Langley, Virginia, un terrorista dispara un arma al tráfico en hora pico. Las víctimas parecían elegidas al azar, pero el motivo podría ser político y apunta a los empleados de la Agencia Central de Inteligencia.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: El día antes de Acción de Gracias, una madre descubrió que su hijo de 10 años había desaparecido de la escuela. Nadie sabía cómo podía haber sucedido. En pocas horas, toda la familia del niño estaba desesperada buscándolo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En una tarde de verano en la lujosa Lodi, California, una niña de doce años es secuestrada de su casa. Muchos oficiales de policía y agentes del FBI se reunieron, determinados a encontrar a la pequeña antes de que fuera demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En la Texas rural, una niña de trece años es secuestrada de camino a la escuela. Desesperado por encontrarla a salvo, su padre millonario contacta a las autoridades locales y al FBI.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: In space, a small gnarly imp-like creature named Jinx steals all of the galaxy's good luck, leaving nothing but bad luck in his wake. On Earth, Betty is concerned Penelope and Paloma may be becoming friends.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty helps Noah with his training but is turned into a baby by Infantor. Noah uses his new skills and an army of babies to save the day.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty discovers that everyone, including Chaz, Noah, Duncan, and the Osborne twins, are flocking to downtown Moose Jaw in an attempt to be cast as extras in a new Hollywood space flick, starring starlet Delta Aurora as a space heroine.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty has been invited to Noah's place, where he is about to demonstrate to her a satellite radio (that inadvertently eavesdrops on Admiral DeGill's personal activities). Leaving, she sees Paloma being chased by Duncan as a result of a prank.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Spindly Tam asks Betty to protect the Beluvian Demon Box, which houses a powerful demon. A "Mad Max" style race unfolds as Maximus, Dr. Cerebral, and Pontifadora all pursue the box.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: An alien creature finds its way into Moosejaw Lake, and the town goes crazy trying to get a look at their very own lake monster: "Moosie". / An evil witch uses a powerful mirror to trap the townspeople and unleash their mirror opposites.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus is playing a killer game of croquet – literally! Earth is in danger of being knocked into the sun, and all mayhem breaks loose when it looks like the end of the world is near.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty and her crew must stop an army of Abomo-Neutrino Snowmen led by Iciclia from attacking the Temple of the Stars on the wintery planet Nordikhan.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: With no new villains on the prow, Headquarters considers disbanding the Galactic Guardians, but is this all part of Maximus' secret scheme? Meanwhile, on Earth, Betty enters a pumpkin pie baking contest.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Maximus' grandfather, Max Sr. Sr. moves into the local retirement home and begins stealing youth from the citizens of Moosejaw Heights. Chaz and Penelope are in the line of fire while visiting their grandmother.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: The Galactic Guardians are putting on a charity circus to raise money for the Junior Galactic Guardians League, with DeGill as the ringmaster! The Chameleon sneaks in and tries to swipe the proceeds.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty's class is assigned homework where they have to compose their own fairy tale. Later, Betty receives a package at Galactic Guardian headquarters.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty must stop Dr. Cerebral and his henchman, a living computer virus called The Worm, from entrapping the robots vacationing at Robot Paradise (including X-5 and his uncle B-1), and creating a giant Frankenstein-like robot.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty's called on a mission to stop Maximus from purging the galaxy's gold resources to build a golden statue of himself.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty is called off to a mission where she must teach young Galactic Guardians in training the power of responsibility, but it's all a front for Maximus' latest scheme to eliminate Betty.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Spoiled, selfish Empress Narcissitad is kidnapped by Maximus and held prisoner on the computer junkyard planet of Crushton (home to X-5's uncle, B-1).

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty is jealous of Chaz's best friend from private school, Sam. Maximus gets his hands on Betty's drawings of Chaz and attempts to kidnap him for bait.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: A tiny plant Betty must transport to a planet starts to grow at an alarming rate! Meanwhile, on Earth, Betty does a few chores./ Nuclea absorbs a Grey Hole and gains the ability to absorb matter and transform it into pure energy.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty goes on a class camping trip to get a little R&R. Maximus decides his Blood Monks need a little boot camp training...on Earth.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Betty is called to Spindley Tam's fortress to investigate his mysterious disappearance whilst, on Earth, Noah presents a rare coin for show-and-tell.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Infantor forms an army of obedient slaves to do his bidding while, on Earth, Paloma and Betty try to keep Betty's cousin Kyle from getting into trouble at the mall.

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: Purrsy accidentally stows away on Betty's ship as she spies on Maximus.

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty
programme.desc: While on a field trip to a local television station, the bus carrying Betty and Sparky is hijacked and taken to an intergalactic 3-V station. As Betty and Sparky realizes what had happened, they discover the cause.

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.title: Atomic Betty

programme.desc: In order to reach the Emperor of the Eastern Caverns, Eli and Junjie pose as Underlords to enter the Tournament of Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In a climactic battle, Junjie and Eli confront the Emperor and the Dai-Fu as the fate of the entire Eastern Caverns hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While Junjie struggles with the knowledge of what he did during his time as the Dark Slinger, the Shane Gang meet a former servant of the Emperor who wants to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang arrives at a cavern overrun by thieves, they decide to use Pronto as bait, hoping the thieves will eliminate each other as each strives to be the first to capture the valuable molenoid.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang travel to the Auroris Mine, they discover a legendary monster carved out of stone attacking the mines—the Pyritor.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Determined to up his game against Stone Warriors, Kord visits a famous Eastern Technician for help creating a new blaster upgrade.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A winter-time holiday has arisen in the Eastern Caverns around the mysterious “Giver,” who makes an annual visit to deliver slugs to the people of the East.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Junjie recounts the ancient history of the Eastern Caverns and his ancestors, and the events that led to his downfall and transformation from the Eastern Champion to the Dark Slinger.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Pronto accidentally uses the Emperor's sword blaster, he can suddenly do no wrong.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Emperor has returned! After the Shane Gang failed to defeat the Iron Warrior, the Emperor sets to work creating even more Unstoppable Warriors to reclaim the Eastern Caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends in the Eastern Caverns—and even some of their old enemies—to help them take down the Emperor and all of his Unstoppable Warriors once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang return home to the 99 caverns to find Gateway Cavern overrun with slugs—in Eli’s absence, the Shadow Clan have governed by putting the slugs before the people, and the result is chaos!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang take Tad under their wing, training him to blast like a pro and live by the slugslinger’s code.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, so the Gang set off without him to investigate reports of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad’s plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Burpy is sick, and the only thing that will cure him is a trip to the Lightwell — a mysterious, hidden power source only slugs (and the Shadow Clan) know the way to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny’s Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay reveals to Cole that he made two wishes with Nadakhan. Large chunks of NINJAGO City are disappearing without a trace. The ninja find the Tiger Widow Island on the map but it is an island that exists on no other chart or database.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay is trapped on Nadakhan’s ship, as Nadakhan tries to force him to make his third wish. Lloyd, Cole, and Nya are marooned on Tiger Widow Island.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the midst of an epidemic of mysterious metal thefts by the Vermillion Warriors, Lloyd realizes that stepping up and taking over for the ailing Master Wu is not an easy task.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While the Ninja fight to save MegaMonster Amusement Park, Jay struggles to defend his family's home from the Vermillion Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja celebrate their escape from the Vermillion Army and their retrieval of the Emerald Time Blade, but with Acronix and Krux determined to get their Blade back, the Airjitzu Temple becomes a battleground.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed as Nya confronts the Samurai X imposter, Kai pursues the truth about his parents and the other Ninja desperately seek to locate and rescue Master Wu. But as usual, some answers only lead to more questions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai confronts his dad for aiding the Hands of Time, only to discover that his parents are actually Acronix and Krux's captives.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Hands of Time blackmail Kai and Nya into using their combined Elemental powers to retrieve the fourth and final Time Blade from the Boiling Sea with the promise that the siblings can use its reversal power to save the quickly-fading Master Wu.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai and Nya stow away aboard Krux and Acronix’s time-traveling snake mech in a desperate attempt to save Master Wu. But when they arrive in the past, they must help the Elemental Masters prevent the Hands of Time from re-writing Ninjago history.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wake of a vicious attack upon the palace, the Sons of Garmadon steal the second Oni Mask, and the ninja invite the royal princess, Harumi, into their makeshift family.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi adjusts to life with the ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order to join the Sons of Garmadon, Zane (aka Snake Jaguar) participates in a deadly motorcycle initiation race.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Zane’s near demise at the hands of Mr. E forces the ninja to flee aboard the Bounty, where they discover that a transmission Zane intercepted may reveal the hidden location of the Quiet One.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi venture deep into Primeval’s Eye in search of the third Oni Mask, the ninja attempt to fix the Bounty and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi search the Oni Temple for the last mask, the ninja are taken hostage and discover Princess Harumi’s true intentions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja appeal to the police commissioner of Ninjago in an effort to help save Lloyd and thwart Harumi’s efforts to resurrect the evil Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Just when the Ninja think they have saved the day, Lord Garmadon returns to NINJAGO, and frees Harumi, who encourages him to “achieve his true potential” by conquering the one thing that has always stood in his way… his son, Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja race to save Lloyd, as a more powerful-than-ever Lord Garmadon creates an enormous Colossi to help him rule NINJAGO and defeat the ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Ninjago has become a bleak, enemy-occupied city ruled by Emperor Garmadon and his Sons of Garmadon biker gang.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Michael Dobson, a sleazy nightclub owner, crosses the detectives' path again when his second wife is killed.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis' investigation of the murders of a mother and son leads to the father, but Kincaid uncovers the real killer.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation of a gay man's murder leads the detectives to his former employer who sexually harassed him.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A model's death seems to be an open-and-shut case until the prime suspect claims he suffered an extreme emotional disturbance and that he loved the victim.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A shooting incident leads Briscoe and Curtis to a teen who had been given to a drug dealer to settle his mother's drug debts.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A father and daughter running a prostitution ring become prime suspects when Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a college student.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Multiple murders lead detectives to a homeless schizophrenic who has been off medication for some time.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis (Jerry Orbach, Benjamin Bratt) investigate the poisoning of an infant in a wealthy neighborhood.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe, Curtis, McCoy and Kincaid witness an execution and try to come to terms with their roles in the killing of another human being.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and his new partner, D.A. Jamie Ross, handle a difficult case involving a carjacking and murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate a case involving a woman who was killed for her identity by her own sister.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A young woman of Italian descent changes her story when her fingerprints turn up at the apartment of a murdered black college student.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: In a twisting, turning whodunit, Briscoe and Curtis (Jerry Orbach, Benjamin Bratt) investigate the murder of a rare-coin dealer. With Sam Waterston, Carey Lowell, S. Epatha Merkerson and Steven Hill.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A crooked cop testifies against Briscoe after the detectives are involved in a botched drug-bust leading to a drug-dealer's death.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A mentally ill college student participating in experimental drug research becomes a suspect in a janitor's murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of an underhanded used-car salesman who was wanted for unpaid child support.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a la aventura de aprendizaje de Little Angel! Desde explorar profesiones hasta comprender los sentidos, la alimentación sana, la anatomía y las visitas al médico, ¡cada paso es un descubrimiento de conocimiento y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para un armonioso viaje con los Little Angels mientras se sumergen en el mundo de las emociones. Con una melodía pegadiza y un poco de magia, convierten las lágrimas en sonrisas.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en las encantadoras melodías que inspiran dulces sueños y sonrisas.
